title: ranunculus linearis
intro: Ranunculus linearis, also known as the small-flowered ranunculus or small-flowered buttercup, is a species of flowering plant in the buttercup family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating skin conditions and wounds due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Ranunculus linearis include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and soothing skin irritations. Herbal preparations of Ranunculus linearis can be found in the form of tinctures, infusions, and salves, which can be used externally to treat skin conditions and promote wound healing.
